violations.description: Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. A pan of beef in the 3 comp sink was not kept under running water.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --No sanitizer bucket was set up at the time of inspection.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. An employees keys and cigarettes were stored on a prep counter in the kitchen.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Floor by dishwasher needs repaired. - Wall above dishwasher by a/c unit needs repair- water damage.
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
